race_meta.race_name: DragonBet The Roar Before Cheltenham Welcome Offer Handicap Chase

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed as legends have it at position 2 (23.0% probability) vs top pick Star Of Affinity (25.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~2.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Star Of Affinity > As Legends Have It, but actual result was As Legends Have It > Realta Liath. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner As Legends Have It showed negative divergence (-19.1%): Model overvalued at 23.0% vs Market 42.1%. Market sentiment more accurate than model.
